general.containerClass: flex flex-col items-center w-full px-0 py-0

header.containerClass: w-full flex items-center justify-center mb-1 px-1

avatar.imageClass: h-[15rem] w-[15rem] border-8 border-[#d60e75] dark:border-[#d60e75] shadow-2xl rounded-full object-cover bg-slate-200

identity.nameClass: text-[30px] font-black tracking-tight text-[#d60e75] dark:text-[#d60e75] uppercase leading-[1.1]
identity.lastNameClass: text-[24px] font-bold text-[#d60e75] dark:text-[#d60e75] uppercase leading-[1]
identity.rutClass: text-base font-mono font-bold text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-200 tracking-wide mt-0.5

validity.containerClass: flex justify-center gap-x-12 w-full px-3 mb-2
validity.labelClass: text-[15px] font-black text-[#d60e75] dark:text-[#d60e75] uppercase tracking-wide leading-[1] mb-0.5

metadata.label: NRO REGISTRO SERNAPESCA:
metadata.labelClass: text-[18px] font-black text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wide inline mr-2
metadata.valueClass: text-2xl font-mono font-black text-[#283c7f] dark:text-blue-400 tracking-wider inline
metadata.containerClass: w-full px-3 mb-1 py-1 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 text-center

qr.containerClass: flex justify-center items-center w-full px-2 mt-0 gap-1
